title: Density-Diversity-Distribution-Distance Sampling (4DS)
text_0: **Idea:** 4DS combines four criteria computed from a generative mixture-model classifier: distance to the decision boundary (uncertainty), density of the sample’s region (representativeness), diversity within the batch (non-redundancy), and class-distribution balancing. It selects a batch by greedily maximizing a weighted sum of these scores with automatically adapted weights, yielding uncertain, representative, and non-redundant queries.

title: Batch Density-Diversity-Distribution-Distance Sampling (4DS)
text_0: **Idea:** 4DS combines four criteria computed from a generative mixture-model classifier: distance to the decision boundary (uncertainty), density of the sample’s region (representativeness), diversity within the batch (non-redundancy), and class-distribution balancing. It selects a batch by greedily maximizing a weighted sum of these scores with automatically adapted weights, yielding uncertain, representative, and non-redundant queries.
